items.title: S01E01 - Jeff Slade and the Loop of Infinity
items.summary: Jeff Slade is a detective who is in trouble with his boss when a stakeout goes wrong. His partner, Holly Turner, is on-hand to help him out. Her methods, however, are unusual (to say the least!) and involve a time machine.

infolabels.title: Jeff Slade and the Loop of Infinity
infolabels.plot: Jeff Slade is a detective who is in trouble with his boss when a stakeout goes wrong. His partner, Holly Turner, is on-hand to help him out. Her methods, however, are unusual (to say the least!) and involve a time machine.

items.title: S01E02 - A Death in the Family
items.summary: When Turner's Aunt Mary is poisoned in a five star restaurant, Slade and Turner travel back in time to find the murderer, They discover that Turner's Aunt and Uncle weren't the people who she originally thought they were.

infolabels.title: A Death in the Family
infolabels.plot: When Turner's Aunt Mary is poisoned in a five star restaurant, Slade and Turner travel back in time to find the murderer, They discover that Turner's Aunt and Uncle weren't the people who she originally thought they were.

items.title: S01E03 - Fashion Shoot
items.summary: When a top fashion designer receivs death threats, the entire division is assigned to guard her at the forthcoming fashion show. Their efforts fail however and she is shot on the catwalk - or was she?

infolabels.title: Fashion Shoot
infolabels.plot: When a top fashion designer receivs death threats, the entire division is assigned to guard her at the forthcoming fashion show. Their efforts fail however and she is shot on the catwalk - or was she?

items.title: S01E04 - The Revenge of the Chronology Protection Hypothesis
items.summary: When Turner sees a news report telling her that Slade has been shot, she travels back in time to try and prevent the shooting. However, if it wasn't for her Slade wouldn't have been shot in the first place it seemed.

infolabels.title: The Revenge of the Chronology Protection Hypothesis
infolabels.plot: When Turner sees a news report telling her that Slade has been shot, she travels back in time to try and prevent the shooting. However, if it wasn't for her Slade wouldn't have been shot in the first place it seemed.

items.title: S01E05 - Sins of the Father
items.summary: Slade is framed for stealing diamonds, and it's suspiciously like a similar incident which had happened to Slade's father, Jack, nearly five years ago. With the help of Turner and her time machine is he able to prove that both Jack and himself are innocent.

infolabels.title: Sins of the Father
infolabels.plot: Slade is framed for stealing diamonds, and it's suspiciously like a similar incident which had happened to Slade's father, Jack, nearly five years ago. With the help of Turner and her time machine is he able to prove that both Jack and himself are innocent.

items.title: S01E06 - Death Minister
items.summary: When Grisham becomes suspicious of Slade's success rate in solving crimes, Turner decided to warn Slade that they had been using the machine too much - when an MP is killed however, they simply can't resist taking a look.

infolabels.title: Death Minister
infolabels.plot: When Grisham becomes suspicious of Slade's success rate in solving crimes, Turner decided to warn Slade that they had been using the machine too much - when an MP is killed however, they simply can't resist taking a look.

items.title: S01E07 - The Lottery Experiment
items.summary: Turner, in desperate need of money to repair the time machine, devises a plan to win the lottery! (I wondered why he hadn't tried this before!) However, will time let them cheat?

infolabels.title: The Lottery Experiment
infolabels.plot: Turner, in desperate need of money to repair the time machine, devises a plan to win the lottery! (I wondered why he hadn't tried this before!) However, will time let them cheat?

items.title: S01E08 - The Broken Crystal
items.summary: Turner's old flame comes back into her life, and Slade finds that his jealousy gets the better of him. A new problem arises when the possibility of another time machine is brought into question. Will they take it?

infolabels.title: The Broken Crystal
infolabels.plot: Turner's old flame comes back into her life, and Slade finds that his jealousy gets the better of him. A new problem arises when the possibility of another time machine is brought into question. Will they take it?
